title: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vijayawada is a city in Andhra Pradesh with a population of 1,500,000. A major commercial and cultural center in Andhra Pradesh, known for the Prakasam Barrage, Kanaka Durga Temple, and spicy cuisine.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
